senses.example: It will not be suicide to admit your mistake.
senses.example_zh: 承认你的错误并不等于自取灭亡。

derivatives: suicidal a. 自杀的;自取灭亡的

entries.mnemonic: 江洋大盗一发生冲突(clash),就举刀乱砍(slash)

senses.def_en: to cut or try to cut sth. violently with a knife, sword etc.
senses.example: The hunter slashed at the bear with his knife. // Most of the seats on the train had been slashed by vandals.
senses.example_zh: 猎人挥刀向熊猛烈砍去。火车上的多数座位都被破坏公物者划破了。

senses.example: The government promises to slash taxes.
He used a slash (/) to indicate a short pause.
senses.example_zh: 他用斜线(/)代表短暂的停顿。

entries.mnemonic: 发音:"先数数",再人口普查

senses.example: A census of population is taken every ten years.
senses.example_zh: 人口普查每十年进行一次。
